subject: Re: Boxnet vs 3090
body:
Hey everyone,

Is anyone out there using RTX 3090 GPUs and *not* having any problems with boxnet or denoising?

It would be really helpful to know if there is somebody using 3090s without a problem - to falsify this n=3(?) finding that they cause a problem with picking and denoising.

Thanks
Teige

> On 25 Feb 2021, at 02:47, tom.de...@gmail.com <tom.dendooven@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> Hi Simon,
> 
> I'm seeing the same here. 
> 
>  Motioncorr and CTF estimation work fine, but particle picking and denoising don't work properly on a workstation with Geforce RTX 3090 cards. The same dataset runs fine on a workstation with 2080 cards. I'll try to retrain the picking/denoising to see if that helps and post the outcome here.
> 
> Cheers,
> Tom
> 
> 
> 
> Op zondag 17 januari 2021 om 15:37:02 UTC schreef simoner...@gmail.com <http://gmail.com/>:
> Hi all,
> 
> Is anyone else experiencing problem with denoising and particle picking on the Geforce 3090? Motioncorr and CTF works very well though. 
> 
>  I have another workstation with two Ti2080s running fine. 
> 
> Thanks and best 
> Simon
> 
> --
